markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

Built a comprehensive portfolio tracking app with auto price fetching for Tesla/SpaceX/xAI investments, showing $300k invested returning ~$1M (+237%). Added French explanatory page to make complex investment story accessible to non-finance audiences, particularly targeting user's wife as audience.


## Context & Intent

User wanted a simple app to track portfolio performance with auto price search, editable acquisition dates/prices, and animated graphs. Later requested adding explanatory content in accessible French to explain the investment story to non-technical audiences.


## What Was Done

Created full-stack portfolio tracker with dark terminal aesthetic, auto TSLA price fetching via Yahoo Finance, private valuations for SpaceX/xAI, inline editing capabilities, animated charts, and added comprehensive French explanatory page styled as accessible magazine content with two-tab navigation.


## Outputs Produced

- [web_app] Portfolio Tracker — React app with portfolio table, price fetching, inline editing, animated charts
- [ui_component] Investment Explainer Page — French magazine-style page explaining Musk investment thesis and returns
- [data_visualization] Animated Charts — Portfolio value, allocation, and performance charts using Recharts

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Used Yahoo Finance API for real-time TSLA prices
- Implemented private valuations based on public funding rounds
- Created two-tab navigation for technical vs explanatory content
- Chose French for accessibility to non-finance audience

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Dark terminal aesthetic
- Inline editing UX
- Auto price fetching
- Magazine-style explanatory content
Discoveries:

- xAI generated highest returns (+400%) in portfolio analysis
- SpaceX/xAI 'fusion' was key value driver
- Need for accessible financial explanations for non-technical audiences

## Open Questions

- Should add PDF export functionality?
- Include scenario modeling for future SpaceX IPO?
- Add more portfolio positions beyond current three?

## Next Steps

- Add direct sharing/PDF export
- Implement IPO scenario simulator
- Consider adding Elon Musk photo to hero section
